> **Generated:** 2026-02-14
> **Analyst:** Senior Architect + Full-Stack Engineer + McKinsey + JPMorgan Perspective
> **Objective:** Complete the investment agent platform through production-ready trading infrastructure

---

## Executive Summary

| Phase | Focus | Business Value | Complexity |
|-------|-------|----------------|------------|
| **Phase 4** | Complete Agent API & Tool Ecosystem | Enable multi-tool orchestration | Medium-High |
| **Phase 5** | Paper Trading & Portfolio Management | Risk-free strategy validation | High |
| **Phase 6** | Enterprise Features & Observability | Production readiness | Medium |

**Total Investment:** ~3-4 sprints | **Risk-Adjusted ROI:** High

---

## Current State Assessment

### ✅ Completed Components

| Component | Status | Quality |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| RAG Core (document/retrieval/llm) | Production-ready | A- |
| Agent Framework (planner/executor) | Core exists | B |
| Knowledge Base (SQLite) | Production-ready | A- |
| Real-time Market Data | Production-ready | A |
| Backtesting Engine | 7 strategies | A |
| WebSocket Infrastructure | 100+ concurrent | B+ |
| Backend API (FastAPI) | Core endpoints | B+ |

### ⚠️ Gaps & Opportunities

1. **Market API** - Empty placeholder (`market.py`)
2. **Agent Integration** - Planner/Executor not exposed via API
3. **Portfolio Management** - Not implemented
4. **Paper Trading** - Not implemented
5. **Authentication** - No auth layer
6. **Observability** - Basic logging only

---

## Phase 4: Complete Agent API & Tool Ecosystem

### 4.1 Why This Matters (McKinsey View)

```
Current Problem:
- User: "Analyze AAPL and tell me if I should buy"
- System: Can only fetch stock data
- Missing: Intent analysis → Multi-tool orchestration → Action recommendation

Solution:
- LLM-powered task decomposition
- Tool chain execution (stock → news → sentiment → recommendation)
- Structured output with confidence scores
```

### 4.2 JPMorgan Trading Desk Perspective

In a prop trading firm, the difference between a research assistant and a trading signal generator is **orchestration**. Phase 4 transforms the system from:

- **Research Tool** → **Trading Assistant** (with human oversight)

### 4.3 Implementation Plan

#### Task 4.1: Market Data API Enhancement

**File:** `backend/app/api/market.py`

```python
# Implement:
# - GET /market/quotes/{symbol} - Real-time quotes
# - GET /market/history/{symbol} - Historical data
# - GET /market/search - Symbol search
# - GET /market/overview - Market indices
```","isEmpty":false,"exceededLimit":false,"totalLines":348,"fileSize":8653,"path":"/Users/[]/github/projects/ai-ml/aiinvest-backend/docs/plans/2026-02-14-phase4-6-strategic-roadmap.md","readRange":{"startLine":1,"endLine":80},"relatedCursorRulePaths":[],"relatedCursorRules":[]}}}},"model_call_id":"c296ab0c-f6be-4dcf-a5d6-26de0a3addd5-3-ndnm","session_id":"ses_2e5453557ffeVnuPv9N2P2wpIx","timestamp_ms":1774283202046}

## Technical Architecture (Post Phase 6)

```mermaid
graph TB
    subgraph "Client Layer"
        A[Web App] --> B[Mobile App]
        A --> C[Trading Terminal]
    end
    
    subgraph "API Gateway"
        D[FastAPI] --> E[Auth Middleware]
        E --> F[Rate Limiter]
    end
    
    subgraph "Agent Core"
        F --> G[Agent API]
        G --> H[Planner]
        H --> I[Executor]
        I --> J[Tool Registry]
    end
    
    subgraph "Data Layer"
        J --> K[Market Data Cache]
        J --> L[Knowledge Base]
        J --> M[Portfolio DB]
    end
    
    subgraph "Trading Layer"
        N[Paper Trading] --> O[Risk Engine]
        O --> P[Order Executor]
    end
    
    subgraph "Observability"
        Q[Prometheus] --> R[Grafana]
        S[OpenTelemetry] --> R
    end
```

---

## Success Metrics

| Phase | Metric | Target |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Phase 4 | Agent analysis success rate | >90% |
| Phase 4 | Tool orchestration depth | 3+ tools |
| Phase 5 | Paper trading P&L accuracy | >99% |
| Phase 5 | Risk metrics calculation time | <100ms |
| Phase 6 | API response time (p95) | <200ms |
| Phase 6 | Auth overhead | <50ms |

---

## Recommended Execution Order

```
Week 1: Phase 4.1-4.3 (Market API + Agent API + Tool Registry)
Week 2: Phase 4.4-4.5 (News + Fundamental Tools)
Week 3: Phase 5.1-5.2 (Portfolio + Paper Trading)
Week 4: Phase 5.3-5.4 (Portfolio API + Risk Metrics)
Week 5: Phase 6.1-6.2 (Auth + Observability)
Week 6: Phase 6.3-6.4 (Caching + Documentation)
```

---

*This roadmap transforms AIInvest from a research prototype into a production-ready trading platform.*
